title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Phoenix Mills is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
